title: Fresh Potatoes
description: My take on 'Rotten Tomatoes' using a C# backend, React/Typescript frontend, and a full MVC app for admin use. Live demo coming soon.

title: HRM Skate Spots
description: Web application for skateboarders to find and share skate spots around HRM. This project was written by Zachary Boutilier, Braden Sampson, and myself. The project uses stripe for a premium subscription which allows users to access the Gemini Flash 2.0 feature

title: Photography Portfolio
description: Rhys Langdon Photography portfolio. This site was created using Adobe Portfolio and custom CMS. The portfolio is designed to present photography examples, contact options, and pricing for Rhys Langdon Photography.
